# mihomo Alpha

MClash controls the MetaCubeX mihomo Alpha core as a separate process.

- Source: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/tree/a70af27451ac6837bcbbd3c542d8207304096e2f
- Release channel: `Prerelease-Alpha`
- License: GPL-3.0

Run `scripts/fetch-mihomo-alpha.sh` to download the architecture-appropriate
binary only after its unpacked SHA-256 has been independently reviewed and
committed. Any distributed build must retain the license, this notice, and the
exact corresponding-source information required by GPL-3.0.
